## Now
<!-- narrative:start -->
**Focus:** Bootstrapping the TradeForge workflow (Forgejo source-of-truth → GitHub
mirror → claude.ai web) on top of the existing game brain.

**Last shipped:** Painted backdrops for all zones + church + playground/fringes split
(in the parent `game` repo, merged); this repo was split out from `game/test`.

**Next:** Finish workflow Phase 3 (web Project + Sync ritual), then resume game work
(player/companion sprite scaling, in-editor path tuning).

**Watch out for:** painted backdrops + 32px sprites are a deliberate mixed style;
a few `../scripts` paths from the monorepo no longer resolve (use `tools/`).
